as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pipe2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="<b>myelin ingest</b><br><font style="font-size:10px">Entity extraction<br>People, tools, decisions<br>Co-occurrence edges</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="420" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pipe3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" value="<b>myelin sleep</b><br><font style="font-size:10px">LLM-driven extraction<br>NREM: Extract style="font-size:13px">Knowledge Graph</b> <font style="font-size:10px;color:#666">SQLite + FTS5 + sqlite-vec</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="400" x="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_nodes" parent="graph" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="<b>Typed Nodes</b><br><font style="font-size:9px">Person, Tool, parent="graph" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="<b>Weighted Edges</b><br><font style="font-size:9px">RelatesTo, DependsOn,<br>Supersedes, LearnedFrom,<br>BelongsTo, EvolvedInto...</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="150" x="190" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_search" parent="graph" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="<b>Search</b><br><font style="font-size:9px">FTS5 keyword (primary)<br>sqlite-vec KNN (optional)<br>Hybrid merge + dedup</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="140" x="360" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="g_salience" parent="graph" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#82b366;" value="<b>Salience</b><br><font style="font-size:9px">Dual-signal scoring<br>Temporal decay curve<br>Reinforcement &gt; duplication</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="120" x="520" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext_label" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=10;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7a3e9d;" value="COPILOT CLI EXTENSION" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="160" x="60" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;startSize=30;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;rounded=1;arcSize=8;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="660" x="200" y="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext_title" parent="ext" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<b style="font-size:13px">Copilot CLI Extension</b> <font style="font-size:10px;color:#666">In-process ESM bundle (extension.mjs)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="460" x="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext_tools" parent="ext" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="<b>6 Tools</b><br><font style="font-size:9px">myelin_query, myelin_boot,<br>myelin_log, myelin_show,<br>myelin_stats, myelin_sleep</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="20" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext_events" parent="ext" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="<b>3 Session Events</b><br><font style="font-size:9px">user.message (boot inject)<br>session.task_complete (auto-log)<br>session.shutdown (end fallback)</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="220" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ext_cli" parent="ext" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#9673a6;" value="<b>CLI Commands</b><br><font style="font-size:9px">parse, ingest, sleep,<br>query, show, stats,<br>doctor, embed, pin...</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="440" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_g_tools" edge="1" parent="1" source="graph" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#999999;" target="ext"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="agent_box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;dashed=1;dashPattern=5 5;" value="<b>Agent Session Loop</b><br><font style="font-size:9px">1. Boot: graph context injected<br>2. Work: tools query/log to graph<br>3. End: summary auto-logged<br>4. Sleep: logs consolidated to graph</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="190" x="900" y="220" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_agent_graph" edge="1" parent="1" source="agent_box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#b85450;dashed=1;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=1;entryY=0.3;" target="graph" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_agent_ext" edge="1" parent="1" source="agent_box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;strokeColor=#b85450;dashed=1;exitX=0;exitY=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.3;" target="ext" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="neuro" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<font style="font-size:9px;color:#888"><i>Brain-inspired: NREM replay extracts knowledge, REM decay prunes stale memories, salience = 0.7 x importance + 0.3 x novelty</i></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="400" x="330" y="710" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
